config.section.name: Donation Requirement for Net Balls
config.NetBallRequirement.name: Disable donation requirement?
config.NetBallRequirement.description: Allows the purchase of Net Balls without fulfilling donation requirements
Netball.Description: A special ball that catches creatures on the water.
BetterNetball.Description: These make catching water creatures much easier.
NetballNote.Description:
To research Net Balls, please donate:
-Common Butterfly
-Moth
-Earthworm
-Black Ant
-Cave Beetle
-Pill Bug
-Hermit Crab
-Sand Worm
